creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Can you add -Dvideo-codecs="vc1dec,h264dec,h264enc,h265dec,h265enc" to graphics/mesa-dri for Vulkan Video on Intel GPUs? It's a new feature in Mesa 23.0: see bug 272575, ports aada4209a3b0 and https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/-/commit/c90e5ddc710a for details.
